geoMap.details: Government holdings predominantly acquired via seizures (e.g., Silk Road, Bitfinex hack). Held in heavily guarded institutional custody solutions.
Vast reserves confiscated from the PlusToken Ponzi scheme and massive illicit mining operations.
Seized from Jian Wen and Zhimin Qian international money laundering network.
First nation-state to adopt BTC as legal tender. Actively purchasing 1 BTC per day explicitly for sovereign treasury reserves.
Accumulated through international cryptocurrency wartime donations and asset seizures.
